security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
An attacker can submit votes without proper authentication or authorization

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be manipulated en route to the contract.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The data transmission channel is not secure enough to protect votes from alteration.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is not protected against eavesdropping or modification.
The governance contract does not verify the integrity of incoming vote messages before processing them.

mitigation.strategy: Implement secure communication channel (e.g., TLS) and message integrity checks.

description: An attacker may intercept and modify vote messages, altering the outcome of a proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes can be cast without sufficient accountability.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide strong audit logs or mechanisms to trace votes back to their originators.

assumptions: The system lacks robust logging and tracking of vote origins and timestamps.
There's no mechanism to verify the identity of the voter beyond the submitted address.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a verifiable vote tracking mechanism with secure audit logs.

description: An attacker can cast votes and deny their participation, making it difficult to hold them accountable.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information might be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is transmitted and stored without proper encryption and access controls.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted in plaintext.
The database storing votes is not properly secured against unauthorized access.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage, and implement appropriate access controls.

description: Sensitive vote information may be leaked to unauthorized parties.
